name: Blueberry-Peach Meringue
recipeInstructions:
1. Let egg whites stand until warmed to room temperature; beat until frothy.
2. Add salt, cream of tartar, and vanilla. Beat until whites begin to hold their shape.
3. Very gradually beat in 1 1/2 cups sugar and continue to beat until stiff but not dry.
4. On a 12-inch heatproof flat plate, spread about one-third of the meringue within one inch of the edge. Pile the remaining meringue around the edge to a height of about 2 1/2 inches, leaving the center unfilled.
5. Bake in a preheated very slow oven for 15 minutes.
6. Cool completely.
7. Pour almond cream filling carefully into the center.
8. Chill for several hours.
9. Just before serving, prepare peaches by sprinkling with lemon juice and sweetening. Arrange peaches and berries on top of the pie.
ALMOND CREAM FILLING
1. In the top part of a small double boiler, mix flour, 1/3 cup sugar, and a dash of salt.
2. Gradually stir this mixture into 6 beaten egg yolks until it coats a metal spoon.
3. Remove from heat and add vanilla and almond extracts.
4. Chill; fold in heavy cream, whipped.
